mapper.select:
SELECT f.HASH_ID AS findNo, f.PATH AS findPath, s.DATA_TYPE AS datatype, f.REGDATE AS findDate, CASE WHEN dp.PROCESSING_FLAG IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS processYn, CASE WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'N' THEN 'N' ELSE NULL END AS trueYn, CASE WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'Y' AND dp.PROCESSING_FLAG IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS remediateYn, dp.REGDATE AS processDate, t.NAME AS targetName, IFNULL(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, '') AS targetIp FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = t.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_summary s ON f.TARGET_ID = s.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = s.AP_NO AND f.HASH_ID = s.OBJECT_ID LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.TARGET_ID = dp.TARGET_ID AND f.HASH_ID = dp.HASH_ID LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND t.GROUP_IDX IN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT IDX FROM pi_target_group WHERE IDX = #{groupId} UNION ALL SELECT tg.IDX FROM pi_target_group tg INNER JOIN CTE ON tg.UP_IDX = CTE.IDX ) SELECT IDX FROM CTE )
AND t.TARGET_ID = #{targetId}
ORDER BY f.REGDATE DESC /* [튜닝] 무제한 결과 방지: 타겟 리포트 최대 10000건으로 제한 */ LIMIT 10000
